div.h1: SIMD Auto-Vectorization: Archetype vs Sparse Set

div.p: Key Insight: Data layout determines compiler optimization potential. Contiguous arrays enable SIMD; indirection prevents it.

g.text: vmulps ymm1, ymm1, ymm2 ; vel * dt
vaddps ymm0, ymm0, ymm1 ; pos += vel*dt

text.tspan: vmulps ymm1, ymm1, ymm2 ; vel * dt
vaddps ymm0, ymm0, ymm1 ; pos += vel*dt

div.p: ✓ 8 entities per instruction ✓ Sequential memory access ✓ Prefetcher optimized
✗ 1 entity per iteration ✗ Random memory access ✗ Prefetcher defeated
